device_name: NAEOTOM Alpha.Peak/ NAEOTOM Alpha; NAEOTOM Alpha.Pro; NAEOTOM Alpha.Prime
intended_use: This computed tomography system is intended to generate and process cross-sectional images of patients by computer reconstruction of x-ray transmission data. The images delivered by the system can be
intended_use_full: This computed tomography system is intended to generate and process cross-sectional images of patients by computer reconstruction of x-ray transmission data. The images delivered by the system can be used by a trained staff as an aid in diagnosis, treatment and radiation therapy planning as well as for diagnostic and therapeutic interventions. This CT system can be used for low dose lung cancer screening in high risk populations.
target_condition: general CT imaging; lung cancer screening; radiotherapy planning (Brachytherapy, Particle/Proton Therapy, External Beam Radiation Therapy, Surgery)
